report.title: Big British Garden Survey Gardens list - full details
report.description: A list of gardens registered for the Big British Garden Survey.
report.query: SELECT #columns# FROM locations l LEFT JOIN locations_websites lw on lw.location_id=l.id AND lw.deleted=false LEFT JOIN cache_termlists_terms ttype ON ttype.id=l.location_type_id LEFT JOIN location_attribute_values vemail ON vemail.location_id=l.id AND vemail.location_attribute_id=429 and vemail.deleted=false JOIN users_websites accesscheck on accesscheck.website_id=lw.website_id AND accesscheck.user_id=#auth_user_id# AND accesscheck.site_role_id<3 LEFT JOIN location_attribute_values vloctype on vloctype.location_id=l.id AND vloctype.location_attribute_id=418 and vloctype.deleted=false LEFT JOIN cache_termlists_terms tloctype on tloctype.id=vloctype.int_value LEFT JOIN location_attribute_values vpollfriendly on vpollfriendly.location_id=l.id AND vpollfriendly.location_attribute_id=391 and vpollfriendly.deleted=false LEFT JOIN location_attribute_values vpollfriendlytiming on vpollfriendlytiming.location_id=l.id AND vpollfriendlytiming.location_attribute_id=414 and vpollfriendlytiming.deleted=false LEFT JOIN location_attribute_values vberries on vberries.location_id=l.id AND vberries.location_attribute_id=393 and vberries.deleted=false LEFT JOIN location_attribute_values vnuts on vnuts.location_id=l.id AND vnuts.location_attribute_id=417 and vnuts.deleted=false LEFT JOIN location_attribute_values vmaturetrees on vmaturetrees.location_id=l.id AND vmaturetrees.location_attribute_id=395 and vmaturetrees.deleted=false LEFT JOIN cache_termlists_terms tmaturetrees on tmaturetrees.id=vmaturetrees.int_value LEFT JOIN location_attribute_values vgrasspatch on vgrasspatch.location_id=l.id AND vgrasspatch.location_attribute_id=396 and vgrasspatch.deleted=false LEFT JOIN cache_termlists_terms tgrasspatch on tgrasspatch.id=vgrasspatch.int_value LEFT JOIN location_attribute_values vpond on vpond.location_id=l.id AND vpond.location_attribute_id=415 and vpond.deleted=false LEFT JOIN location_attribute_values vbirdboxes on vbirdboxes.location_id=l.id AND vbirdboxes.location_attribute_id=399 and vbirdboxes.deleted=false LEFT JOIN location_attribute_values vbatboxes on vbatboxes.location_id=l.id AND vbatboxes.location_attribute_id=400 and vbatboxes.deleted=false LEFT JOIN location_attribute_values vbeehotels on vbeehotels.location_id=l.id AND vbeehotels.location_attribute_id=401 and vbeehotels.deleted=false LEFT JOIN location_attribute_values votherinsecthotels on votherinsecthotels.location_id=l.id AND votherinsecthotels.location_attribute_id=402 and votherinsecthotels.deleted=false LEFT JOIN location_attribute_values vfencehole on vfencehole.location_id=l.id AND vfencehole.location_attribute_id=403 and vfencehole.deleted=false LEFT JOIN location_attribute_values vhedgehogbox on vhedgehogbox.location_id=l.id AND vhedgehogbox.location_attribute_id=404 and vhedgehogbox.deleted=false LEFT JOIN location_attribute_values vdeadwood on vdeadwood.location_id=l.id AND vdeadwood.location_attribute_id=405 and vdeadwood.deleted=false LEFT JOIN location_attribute_values vdrystonewall on vdrystonewall.location_id=l.id AND vdrystonewall.location_attribute_id=406 and vdrystonewall.deleted=false LEFT JOIN cache_termlists_terms tdrystonewall on tdrystonewall.id=vdrystonewall.int_value LEFT JOIN location_attribute_values vdrystonepile on vdrystonepile.location_id=l.id AND vdrystonepile.location_attribute_id=416 and vdrystonepile.deleted=false LEFT JOIN cache_termlists_terms tdrystonepile on tdrystonepile.id=vdrystonepile.int_value LEFT JOIN location_attribute_values vcompostheap on vcompostheap.location_id=l.id AND vcompostheap.location_attribute_id=407 and vcompostheap.deleted=false LEFT JOIN location_attribute_values vgreenroof on vgreenroof.location_id=l.id AND vgreenroof.location_attribute_id=408 and vgreenroof.deleted=false LEFT JOIN location_attribute_values vbirdfood on vbirdfood.location_id=l.id AND vbirdfood.location_attribute_id=412 and vbirdfood.deleted=false LEFT JOIN cache_termlists_terms tbirdfood on tbirdfood.id=vbirdfood.int_value LEFT JOIN location_attribute_values vmammalfood on vmammalfood.location_id=l.id AND vmammalfood.location_attribute_id=413 and vmammalfood.deleted=false LEFT JOIN cache_termlists_terms tmammalfood on tmammalfood.id=vmammalfood.int_value LEFT JOIN location_attribute_values vwildlifeseen on vwildlifeseen.location_id=l.id AND vwildlifeseen.location_attribute_id=431 and vwildlifeseen.deleted=false LEFT JOIN location_attribute_values vmanagement on vmanagement.location_id=l.id AND vmanagement.location_attribute_id=419 and vmanagement.deleted=false LEFT JOIN location_attribute_values vvisitedopengarden on vvisitedopengarden.location_id=l.id AND vvisitedopengarden.location_attribute_id=420 and vvisitedopengarden.deleted=false LEFT JOIN location_attribute_values vopenedgarden on vopenedgarden.location_id=l.id AND vopenedgarden.location_attribute_id=421 and vopenedgarden.deleted=false LEFT JOIN location_attribute_values vtermsconfirm on vtermsconfirm.location_id=l.id AND vtermsconfirm.location_attribute_id=261 and vtermsconfirm.deleted=false LEFT JOIN location_attribute_values vfollowupconsent on vfollowupconsent.location_id=l.id AND vfollowupconsent.location_attribute_id=430 and vfollowupconsent.deleted=false LEFT JOIN location_attribute_values vsubscribe on vsubscribe.location_id=l.id AND vsubscribe.location_attribute_id=422 and vsubscribe.deleted=false LEFT JOIN location_attribute_values vchk on vchk.location_id=l.id AND vchk.location_attribute_id=433 and vchk.deleted=false WHERE #website_filter# AND l.deleted=false AND l.location_type_id=24469

column.name: pollinator_friendly_timing_terms
column.sql: (SELECT string_agg(DISTINCT t.term, '; ' ORDER BY t.term) FROM location_attribute_values lav JOIN cache_termlists_terms t ON t.id=lav.int_value WHERE lav.location_id=l.id AND lav.location_attribute_id=392 AND lav.deleted=false)

column.name: hedging_terms
column.sql: (SELECT string_agg(DISTINCT t.term, '; ' ORDER BY t.term) FROM location_attribute_values lav JOIN cache_termlists_terms t ON t.id=lav.int_value WHERE lav.location_id=l.id AND lav.location_attribute_id=394 AND lav.deleted=false)

column.name: water_feature_terms
column.sql: (SELECT string_agg(DISTINCT t.term, '; ' ORDER BY t.term) FROM location_attribute_values lav JOIN cache_termlists_terms t ON t.id=lav.int_value WHERE lav.location_id=l.id AND lav.location_attribute_id=398 AND lav.deleted=false)

column.name: gardening_terms
column.sql: (SELECT string_agg(DISTINCT t.term, '; ' ORDER BY t.term) FROM location_attribute_values lav JOIN cache_termlists_terms t ON t.id=lav.int_value WHERE lav.location_id=l.id AND lav.location_attribute_id=409 AND lav.deleted=false)

column.name: citizen_science_terms
column.sql: (SELECT string_agg(DISTINCT t.term, '; ' ORDER BY t.term) FROM location_attribute_values lav JOIN cache_termlists_terms t ON t.id=lav.int_value WHERE lav.location_id=l.id AND lav.location_attribute_id=410 AND lav.deleted=false)

column.name: vchk
column.sql: CASE WHEN vchk.int_value IS NULL OR vchk.int_value=24627 THEN 'unchecked' WHEN vchk.int_value=24628 THEN 'checked' WHEN vchk.int_value=24629 THEN 'invalid' ELSE '-' END
